creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
My system FreeBSD 13.2=RELEASE-p4 from yesterdys update (pkg upgrade), I am using packages (latest) I have a problem: seconary monitor doesn't work, mpv open but video doesn't work...I didn't check what doesn't work more.

Thank you.
